def positive_mock_return_value_is_incompatible_type_with_real_signature():
    rule_id = "mock_return_value_is_incompatible_type_with_real_signature"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Mock return value set to a type that is incompatible with the real object's declared return type."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
